feat.name: First Frost
feat.text: The *gelid shard* within your heart may sap your ability to feel and experience emotion, but it also lets you create and manipulate cold. You learn to cast arcane spontaneous spells, and you gain a spell repertoire with the *frostbite* and *frost’s touch* (see below) cantrips. You’re trained in spell attack modifier and spell DC. Your key spellcasting attribute is Charisma.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
